title: Data Analyst
modalContent: Engineered an XGBoost predictive model for HR turnover, shifting decision thresholds to capture ~70% of flight risks.
Built centralized Metabase dashboards to consolidate HR, GA, Labour, and Accounting metrics across 4 departments.

title: AI Tutor
modalContent: Trained and refined AI models remotely, specializing in logic, coding, and analytical reasoning.
Evaluated machine learning outputs to ensure accuracy and alignment with human-centric problem solving.

title: HR Administrator (Example)
modalContent: Managed daily HR operations and reporting.
